heading: Class I or class II redesignation for clean air purposes
label: 410eeee–10 Class I or class II redesignation for clean air purposes
text: For the purposes of part C of the Clean Air Act [ et seq.], the State may redesignate the national river only as class I or class II.42 U.S.C. 7470
notes: References in TextThe Clean Air Act, referred to in text, is , as amended generally by , , , and later by , , . The Clean Air Act was originally classified to chapter 15B (§ 1857 et seq.) of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare. On enactment of , the Act was reclassified to chapter 85 (§ 7401 et seq.) of Title 42. Part C of the Clean Air Act is classified generally to part C (§ 7470 et seq.) of subchapter I of chapter 85 of Title 42.
